# AI PR Reviewer Action

This action performs a deep analysis of a Pull Request using a local or remote LLM. 
It gathers extensive context including PR diffs, linked sources, image digest provenance, 
and repository-wide impact scans to provide a high-signal review.

## Inputs

| Input | Description | Required | Default |
|-------|-------------|----------|---------|
| `github_token` | GitHub token for API access (e.g., `${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}`) | Yes | - |
| `ai_base_url` | Base URL of the AI server (OpenAI compatible) | Yes | - |
| `ai_model` | Model name to use for analysis | Yes | - |
| `ai_fallback_base_url` | Fallback AI server URL | No | - |
| `ai_fallback_model` | Fallback model name | No | - |
| `ai_primary_retries` | Number of retries for the primary model | No | `8` |
| `ai_primary_retry_delay_sec` | Delay between retries in seconds | No | `15` |
| `allowed_source_hosts` | Comma-separated list of hosts allowed for fetching linked sources | No | `github.com,api.github.com,gitlab.com,registry.terraform.io,artifacthub.io,minecraft.net,www.minecraft.net` |
| `system_prompt` | Custom system prompt for the AI | No | (Default provided in action) |
| `standards_file` | Path to the repository standards file (e.g., `CLAUDE.md`) | No | `CLAUDE.md` |

## Outputs

| Output | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `verdict` | The AI's verdict: `approve` or `request_changes` |
| `review_markdown` | The full markdown review generated by the AI |
| `analysis_engine` | Which model/URL was ultimately used for the analysis |

## Requirements

- `gh` CLI
- `jq`
- `curl`
- `git`
- `python3`
